records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Baige Federation changes the 2026 championship calendar or publishes a new season calendar.
limitations: The reviewed official calendar covers the Baige Federation championship and must not be generalised to every racing code or organiser in Kazakhstan.
Several calendar entries use city or event-stage labels rather than canonical racecourse identifiers.
Race times, participants, results, prize information, and betting material remain excluded.
records.notes: The official 2026 federation calendar supports a bounded C-level prototype for meeting dates and venues.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an Egyptian racing authority or operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
limitations: The reviewed international federation directory confirms Egyptian Arabian-racing membership context but is not a domestic meeting calendar.
No current Egyptian meeting date or racecourse pairing is approved.
No automation or nationwide coverage is claimed.
records.notes: Retain an official-context link until a stable Egyptian calendar source is reviewed.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an Algerian racing authority or operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
limitations: The reviewed international federation directory establishes Arabian-racing membership context but does not expose a current Algerian meeting calendar.
General equestrian competition notices must not be treated as horse-racing fixtures.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Keep Algeria link-only until a domestic official racing calendar is reviewed.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an Iranian racing authority publishes a stable current calendar without restricted access or betting-only dependence.
limitations: The reviewed international federation directory confirms Iranian Arabian-racing membership context but does not provide a domestic meeting calendar.
Third-party racing and prediction portals are not accepted as the canonical public source.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Retain an official-context link while a stable authority-owned current calendar remains unconfirmed.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Lao Cai Province announces the next Bac Ha traditional horse-racing festival date and venue.
limitations: The reviewed official source covers the Bac Ha traditional festival only and does not establish nationwide Vietnamese racing coverage.
The confirmed 2026 event has already occurred; future calendar rows require a new official announcement.
Race times, participants, results, prize information, and programme details remain excluded.
records.notes: The provincial source supports manual C-level confirmation for the bounded Bac Ha festival scope when a new official event notice is published.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Bolivian public authority or recognised racing operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed public planning document mentions a local horse race but does not establish a current recurring calendar, authority-wide coverage, or a stable meeting source.
limitations: The evidence is local and planning-oriented rather than a current racing calendar.
No current date and venue pairing is approved.
The source must not be generalised to national Bolivian racing activity.
records.notes: Keep Bolivia out of current-calendar output until a current official meeting source is reviewed.

records.system_name_en: Todos Santos Cuchumatan traditional horse race
records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Guatemalan public authority publishes a current dated notice for the next Todos Santos horse race.
limitations: The reviewed government article documents a cultural tradition rather than a current 2026 meeting notice.
The annual November 1 context is not sufficient by itself to create a future calendar row.
The reviewed scope is limited to Todos Santos Cuchumatan and must not be generalised nationally.
records.notes: Retain a cultural-context official link until a current dated event notice is published.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Honduran public authority or recognised racing operator publishes a current horse-racing calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed national sports portal does not identify a current horse-racing authority, racecourse programme, or meeting calendar.
limitations: General national sport administration is not evidence of an active horse-racing calendar.
No current racecourse or meeting date is approved.
Equestrian disciplines must not be conflated with horse racing.
records.notes: Keep Honduras out of current-calendar output until a specific official racing source is verified.
